title: Metadata
description: Metadata documents overview material for Metadata in the knowledge domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights What Metadata Is, Common Types of Metadata, What Metadata Is Good At, Metadata Versus Schema And Ontology, and Practical Example, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include data about data, ontology, schema, taxonomy, and knowledge, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is knowledge / concepts / metadata, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
